car.new:
Namaste sir Mahindra Finance se bol raha hoon ek baat poochu?

Last 1 saal me gaadi chalate hue kabhi aisa laga ki agar kabhi kuch ho gaya toh headache ho jayega

(Pause. Let them think. This is your hook.)

Main isliye pooch raha hoon sir kyunki jab tak claim nahi aata na, insurance bas ek paper lagta hai. 



Us samay aapka tension kam karne k liye hum hai, us samay srf aapka hi nai saamne wale ka bhi aapko dekhna padta hai and tabhi kise call karu kaise hoga ye sab aapko na sochna pade usliye mahindra finance deta hai aapka sath

Kyuki jab accident hota hai tab hum kuch sochne ki avastha me nai hote tab jo cheeze matter karti hai wo hai:

Kaise hoga sab and kon madat karega 

Last policy me aapko ye guarantee mili tha kya?

(You are now making them evaluate, not just pitching.)

Mahindra 75 saal purani hai, 1300+ branches hai humari,  agar mai nai rahunga to yaha koi aur hoga jo aapki madat karega par kahi aur se karvayenge to unka koi address nai hoga aapke paas us samay, koi aapki madat nai karega, whereas hum aapka sath nai chodenge

Aap hi bataiye jo claims dete hai wo Mahindra finance ki achese sunege ya kisi ek singular agent ki 

Is baar main aapko jo suggest kar raha hoon na sir wo sirf renewal nahi hai
main aapka risk thoda aur cover kar raha hoon:

Zero dep jisme parts ka paisa aapke pocket se nahi
Engine cover flooding ya damage me bada kharcha bachta hai

Matlab simple hai sir chhota premium difference, bada tension difference.

MMFSL car insurance mein zero depreciation cover, cashless repair, 24/7 claim support."

Close (soft, respectful):

Aap boliye sir aap safe rehna chahte ho ya thode se difference k wjhse us time ka tension abhi se rakhna chahte ho

tractor.new:
Namaste sir Mahindra Finance se bol raha hoon ek baat poochu?

Kya aapka tractor sirf ek gaadi hai? Wo aapki shaan aur rozgaar hai utna hi nai wo aapki kheti ki jaan hai. Rabi ho ya kharif, wo tractor hi kaam aata hai. 

Hum nai chahte ki aapke sath kuch aisa kabhi ho Lekin socho, agar baarish mein kuch ho gaya jo pichle saalo se bht jagh ho raha hai, ya khet mein palat gaya, ya sabse kaharb agr koi chor le gaya? 

To Lakho rupaiye ki machine ek din mein barbaad. Mahindra Finance ka Motor Insurance aapke tractor ko puri suraksha deta hai - chori, accident, aur natural disaster bhi cover hota hai. Hamara agent aapke gaon mein hi rehta hai. 

Aur sir jab ye sab hota hai na tab dimaag nai chalta humara kisi aur chiz me tab hume bas support chaiye hota hai kisi bharose mand ka

Aap apni kheti kariye aur hum aapke tractor ki suraksha ki zimmedari lenge, aap bas humara insurance lelo aur, tension hata do.

Bahar se log bhale hi thode se kam paiso me karke de rahe ho but wo 1-2 hazaar ka farak aapko tab tension free nai karega jab aapko utna tension hoga.

life.new:
"Namaste sir,

baithiye,. Ek kaam ki baat karni thi, but pehle yeh batao — ghar mein sab theek hai na? Bacche kaisa kar rahe hain school mein?

aapka ek financial health check up karna tha aaj, jo kaafi gambhir hai.

Aapke ghar ka — matlab roz ka — khana, school, EMI, bijli, petrol, kabhi baahaar khaana — sab milaakar roughly kitna jaata hai ek mahine mein? 
estimate bhi chalega.
Haan? 25,000 ke around? Theek hai.
mai apna calculator nikalta hu 25,000 Ab 200 se multiply karte hai
.
kitna Aaya pata hai? 50 lakh.

Yeh 50 lakh — yeh woh raqam hai jo aapke ghar ko chahiye — agar aap kal nahi rahe. Bas survive karne ke liye. Koi luxury nahi, koi extra nahi — sirf wahi jo aaj chal raha hai — wahi chalta rahe. 50 lakh.
Abhi aapke paas yeh 50 lakh kahin hain? FD mein? Account mein? Honestly boliye.

Nahi hain na.

Toh bhai — aaj ki tarikh mein — honestly — aapka ghar financially unprotected hai. Yeh main judgement se nahi bol raha, yeh fact hai. Aur yeh fact aap bhi jaante the — bas kabhi aise seedha sochaa nahi tha.
Aur ek aur cheez — aap abhi kamate ho, kitna? 35,000? 40,000?
Retire kab karoge? 60 pe? Toh roughly 20-22 saal baaki hain.
40,000 into 12 into 22 — bhai yeh 1 crore 5 lakh se upar jaata hai. Yeh woh paisa hai jo aap apni working life mein generate karoge — apne ghar ke liye. Yeh aapki value hai. Financially.
Aur agar kal kuch ho jaaye — woh poora number — woh 1 crore — woh ek jhatke mein khatam. Family ke paas kya bachega?
Aur yeh socho — retirement mein kya hoga? Body 60 ke baad saath nahi deti. Income band. Bacche apni life mein busy honge — unka ghar, unki EMI, unke tension. Aap khud nahi chahoge ki unke aage haath phaelana pade. Yeh self-respect ka sawaal hai apna.

Toh sir  — jo main aapko abhi batane wala hu — woh Life ka hai, Mahindra Finance ke through. Mahindra pe trust hai aapka pehle se — aur HDFC ka naam toh jaante ho. Website pe bhi dekh lo — clearly likha hua hai dono ka partnership.
Yeh plan do kaam karta hai ek saath. Ek — aaj se aapka ghar covered hai. 50 lakh ka cover — immediately. Agar kuch bhi ho — family ko woh raqam milti hai. Do — aap theek rahe, poori life jeeye — toh maturity pe ek amount milta hai aapko. Yeh aapka retirement fund ban sakta hai. Khud ka paisa, kisi pe depend nahi

Aur sir — ek baat honestly bolun? Aapne apni poori zindagi mein jo bhi kiya — naukri, mehnat, sacrifice — woh sab kiske liye kiya? Apni family ke liye na? Bacchon ke liye?
Toh yeh plan basically woh guarantee hai — jo aap unhe de rahe ho. Chahe tum ho ya na ho — unki zindagi nahi rukegi. Bacche ka college nahi rukega. Beti ki shaadi nahi rukegi.
Yeh gift hai sir. sabse bada gift jo ek insaan apni family ko de sakta hai.
Premium? sir ek din ke baahaar ke khaane se bhi kam. Per day calculate karo toh. Itna.
(Tell them about the plan now and the benefits that come with it)
